reason: Phase 4a adds the per-soldier combat math (per-type profile, charge term, facing gate, opposed land contest, and wound) as pure, unit-tested functions, but does NOT wire them into the live melee yet -- the regiment circle still resolves casualties, so there is no on-screen change to film. The gameplay change comes in phase 4b. Covered by test/unit/test_soldier_combat.gd (28 tests).
